summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EV Trip Planner application. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper integration between components.
passed_tests: Valid trip calculation API (New Delhi to Mumbai)
Low battery scenario with charging stops
Frontend page load and app title display
Trip form visibility and all input fields
Vehicle presets (Tesla Model 3, Nissan Leaf, BMW iX)
Results dashboard display with trip status
Trip statistics display (distance, ETA, energy, final charge)
Map container and Mapbox map rendering
Error message display for invalid locations
Short trip feasibility calculation (Delhi to Gurgaon)
